versions.version_description: Transposed to D for ease of playing in standard tuning, more accurate chords and structure.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Arranged by: ANDY BECK

Performance time: approx. 3.10

[Intro] 
[ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Bbsus4[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]

[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Bbsus4[/ch]
Oh don't you dare look back[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
Just keep your eyes on me.[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Bbsus4[/ch]
I said you're holding back,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
She said shut up and dance with me![/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Bbsus4[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
This woman is my destiny[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Bbsus4[/ch]
She said oh oh oh[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gm7[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]   
Shut up and dance with me[/tab]

[ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]

[ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]F/A[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab] [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
We were victims of the night,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
  The chemical, physical, kryptonite[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]F/A[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
   Helpless to the bass and faded light[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]
   Oh we were bound to get together,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]F/A[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
Bound to get together.[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bb/D[/ch]     [ch]Eb6[/ch]
She took my arm,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]F/A[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
I don't know how it happened.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb/D[/ch]    [ch]Eb6[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
We took the floor and she said[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
Oh don't you dare look back[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Gm[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
Just keep your eyes on me.[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]
I said you're holding back,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Gm[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
She said shut up and dance with me![/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Gm[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
This woman is my destiny[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]
She said oh oh oh[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gm[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
Shut up and dance with me[/tab]

[ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] 

[ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]

[Verse 2]              
[tab]   [ch]F/A[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]    
A backless dress and some beat up sneaks,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
  My discothèque, Juliet teenage dream.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]F/A[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]         
  I felt it in my chest as she looked at me.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]              
I knew we were bound to get together,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]F/A[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
Bound to get together.[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bb/D[/ch]     [ch]Eb6[/ch]
She took my arm,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]F/A[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
I don't know how it happened.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb/D[/ch]    [ch]Eb6[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
We took the floor and she said[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
Oh don't you dare look back[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Gm[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
Just keep your eyes on me.[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]
I said you're holding back,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Gm[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
She said shut up and dance with me![/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Gm[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
This woman is my destiny[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]
She said oh oh oh[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gm[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
Shut up and dance with me[/tab]


[ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]           
[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Bb/D[/ch]    [ch]Eb6[/ch]
Deep in her eyes,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]F/A[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]
I think I see the future.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb/D[/ch]  [ch]Eb6[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]F/A[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]
I realize this is my last chance.[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bb/D[/ch]     [ch]Eb6[/ch]
She took my arm,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]F/A[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
I don't know how it happened.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb/D[/ch]    [ch]Eb6[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
We took the floor and she said[/tab]


[Intro]
(2x)
[ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Bbsus4[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]


[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Bbsus4[/ch]
Oh don't you dare look back[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
Just keep your eyes on me.[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Bbsus4[/ch]
I said you're holding back,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
She said shut up and dance with me![/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Bbsus4[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
This woman is my destiny[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Bbsus4[/ch]
She said oh oh oh[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gm7[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]   
Shut up and dance[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
Don't you dare look back[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Gm[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
Just keep your eyes on me.[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]
I said you're holding back,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Gm[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
She said shut up and dance with me![/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Gm[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
This woman is my destiny[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]
She said oh oh oh[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gm[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]            
Shut up and dance with me [/tab]

[ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]      [ch]Gm[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]      
Oh oh oh Shut up and dance with me [/tab]
